faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about DarLink AI.

q1.question: Is DarLink AI really free to try?
q1.answer: Yes! You can create a free account and start chatting immediately. The free tier gives you a taste of the experience. To unlock unlimited messages, advanced image generation, and voice features, you'll need to upgrade to a paid plan.

q2.question: Is my data and conversation private?
q2.answer: Absolutely. DarLink takes privacy extremely seriously. All your conversations are encrypted and never shared with third parties. Your generated images and videos are private to your account only. The platform is hosted on secure servers in Switzerland, known for strict privacy laws.

q3.question: Can I create my own custom AI girlfriend?
q3.answer: Yes! With the Ultimate plan, you get full character creation tools. Design her personality, appearance, voice, backstory, and even specific kinks or preferences. It's like building your dream companion from scratch.

q4.question: What makes DarLink better than other AI girlfriend apps?
q4.answer: Three things: (1) Unrestricted NSFW conversations without annoying filters, (2) Advanced AI image AND video generation that actually looks good, and (3) Realistic voice messages that bring your AI girlfriend to life. No other platform combines all three at this quality level.

q5.question: How does the AI remember conversations?
q5.answer: DarLink uses advanced long-term memory technology. Your AI girlfriend remembers details from previous chats, references inside jokes, and evolves her personality based on your interactions. The more you chat, the more personalized the experience becomes.

q6.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
q6.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime with no questions asked. There are no long-term contracts or cancellation fees. If you cancel, you'll keep access until the end of your current billing period.
